tailwind.container: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-3xl shadow-[0_32px_64px_-15px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)] border border-white/20 overflow-hidden
tailwind.header_cells: px-8 py-6 text-[10px] font-black text-white uppercase tracking-[0.2em]
tailwind.row: hover:bg-blue-50/50 transition-all duration-300 border-b border-gray-50 last:border-none
tailwind.numeric: font-black text-blue-600 bg-blue-50/50 px-3 py-1 rounded-lg text-xs tabular-nums
tailwind.pagination: flex items-center gap-2 p-6 border-t border-gray-50

tailwind.container: p-8 bg-white rounded-[2.5rem] shadow-[0_40px_80px_-20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] border border-gray-50 hover:-translate-y-2 transition-all duration-500 animate-float max-w-[400px] mx-auto
tailwind.title: text-4xl font-black text-gray-900 tracking-tighter uppercase mb-6 leading-none
tailwind.description: text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-[9px] leading-relaxed
tailwind.input: w-full px-6 py-4 bg-gray-50 border-none rounded-2xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/20 transition-all font-medium text-gray-900 placeholder:text-gray-300 text-sm

tailwind.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-600 via-blue-600 to-cyan-500 text-white font-black px-10 py-5 rounded-[1.25rem] shadow-2xl shadow-blue-500/30 hover:scale-[1.05] active:scale-95 transition-all uppercase tracking-widest text-[11px]
tailwind.success: bg-gradient-to-r from-emerald-500 to-teal-500 text-white font-black px-10 py-5 rounded-[1.25rem] shadow-2xl shadow-emerald-500/30 hover:scale-[1.05] transition-all uppercase tracking-widest text-[11px]
tailwind.outline: border-2 border-blue-600/10 text-blue-600 font-black px-10 py-5 rounded-[1.25rem] hover:bg-blue-50 transition-all uppercase tracking-widest text-[11px]

tailwind.primary: bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-600 px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest border border-blue-500/20 animate-pulse
tailwind.success: bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-600 px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest border border-emerald-500/20
